text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Riiiing...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Geez, you're loud! Are you trying to destroy my eardrums?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: B-b-but... I m-mean! Sob... The three of us have finally... finally...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WAAAAAAHHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Calm down, Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Are you planning to cry out all of the carrot juice
you just drank for our toast?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During lunchtime, my attention is drawn to a
sudden burst of noise and activity. I look over to
see Narita Taishin, Biwa Hayahide, and Winning
Ticket together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is honest, full of energy, and
wears her heart on her sleeve. She's determined
to become a Derby champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide bases her running on a winning
equation she personally calculated and boasts an
overwhelming record of consecutive victories.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They both appear to be great friends with Narita
Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But I do understand where your joy is coming
from, Ticket. I'm happy too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: After all, the three of us have all finally debuted.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh! That's right! And I... I...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Waaaah! I want us to keep racing against each
other foreveeerrr!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'd rather not. You're way too noisy.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But come on! You're going for the Triple Crown,
right?! That's my goal too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna be a Derby champiooon!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Heh. While I do understand just how capable you
two are...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I won't let that stop me from emerging victorious.
I'll be the one who claims the throne of the Triple
Crown champion.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hah. Says you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: During afternoon training...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, my ears still hurt... It's all Ticket's fault.
choice_data_list: You three looked like you were having a blast.
You three looked like you were having a blast.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? You were watching us? Wait, that's what you think it looked like?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's not like we're good friends or anything. It's
just...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
When you're new at the academy, they start you
doing 1,000-meter runs to get used to racing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I didn't have the patience to take it slow, so I
decided to run 2,400 instead.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But then those two said they'd run the same for
some reason.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, that's how the three of us ended up as
rivals.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, Biwa Hayahide's moves are timed so
perfectly... It's like she already knows how the
entire race is going to play out!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Ticket's pretty impressive too! Her explosive
power is out of this world!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Ugh, damn those two!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm not gonna lose to theeem!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I wasn't used to running the classic
distances then, and in normal circumstances, I
wouldn't have been able to put up much of a
fight.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But for some reason, I managed to summon up
enough strength.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Dang, it's still too much for me to run the whole
2,400 meters well...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (But I managed to get a better time than usual.)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wow, wow, wow, WOOOOW!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whoa! What the hell are you—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Your name's Narita Taishin, right?! I'm Winning
Ticket!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I got all shivery watching your final sprint! That was awesome!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You're strong, so I claim you as my rival! Run
another race with me, pleeeaaase!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Another race? That sounds like an entertaining
idea you have there.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Would it be alright if I join as well?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What the... What's with you two?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ticket's been a pain in the butt since then, and
Hayahide's just kinda been around too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That's all.
choice_data_list:
So your first race against each other was what
brought you together.

So your first race against each other was what
brought you together.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't the first time I raced one of them,
though...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Nothing. Anyway, the point is that we're not good
friends or anything.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But... I do know just how good they are.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That goes for both Ticket and Hayahide. I don't
wanna admit it, but they're really good.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
They're both going for the Triple Crown too. You
know what that means, right?
choice_data_list: There's no way we can lose to them!
There's no way we can lose to them!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Glad we're on the same page. Let's get to training
already.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We dedicate the day to preparing for the
inevitable battles Narita Taishin must face against
Winning Ticket and Biwa Hayahide.
